description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a minimalist rectangular design and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in a light gray concrete texture, with large, simple windows and a prominent overhanging upper floor. The front features a covered carport with two parked vehicles, a tiled driveway, and a small landscaped area with trees and plants. The side and rear facades are mostly solid, with a few windows and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing privacy and clean lines. The house has a mix of open and enclosed spaces, including a balcony and a sheltered entryway. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, gray concrete exterior, large windows, and a covered carport. The design is minimalist with clean lines and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two vehicles, main entryway, tiled driveway, and landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid gray wall, minimal windows, and a single tree along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a balcony, additional entry, and more open space with tiled ground and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, two stories of windows, and a blue vehicle parked at the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway integrated with a carport, flat overhang, minimal steps, and a simple modern door.
